title: Management Trainee
description:
Job description

TMBH Crew Extraordinaire!

Position Overview
Are you ready to roll? We’re on the hunt for TMBH CREW who’s excited to whip up delicious bagelwiches and serve up smiles at our joints! If you love the smell of fresh bagels, enjoy crafting delightful beverages, and thrive in a dynamic team environment, this is the perfect opportunity for you. Get ready to dive into a world of flavors and fun!

We are grooming crews to be an outlet manager with stable career growth.


Your Culinary Adventure Awaits

Key Responsibilities :

Kitchen Duties :

  • Ingredient Aficionado:
  • Keep our ingredients fresh and fabulous! You’ll be the guardian of quality, ensuring everything we use is top-notch.
  • Regularly check the freshness of our ingredients—because who doesn’t love a crisp veggie or a perfectly ripe avocado?
  • Food Wizardry:
  • Follow our magical recipes to create mouthwatering dishes. Measure, weigh, and mix like a pro!
  • Channel your inner chef by baking, grilling, steaming, and boiling all sorts of deliciousness—think meats, veggies, fish, and more!
  • Workstation Wonder:
  • Set up your workstation like a culinary artist! Gather all the ingredients and equipment you need for seamless food prep.
  • Keep an eye on inventory levels so we never run out of those essential bagel toppings!
  • Sanitation Superhero:
  • Maintain a sparkling clean work area. You’ll be handling utensils and equipment like a true sanitation champion!
  • Clean and sanitize regularly—because safety is always in style.
  • Operational Rockstar:
  • Execute opening and closing procedures with flair! You’ll help kick off each day with energy and wrap it up smoothly.
  • Master our kitchen equipment, from broilers to fryers, and show them who’s boss!

Barista & Front of House Duties:

  • Beverage Maestro:
  • Craft delicious coffee drinks that keep our customers buzzing! From lattes to espressos, your barista skills will shine.
  • Ensure all beverages are prepared to perfection while maintaining a clean and organized beverage station.
  • Customer Service Superstar:
  • Greet customers with a warm smile and provide excellent service as they place their orders.
  • Assist customers in selecting menu items, answering questions about ingredients, and making recommendations.
  • Order Management:
  • Take orders accurately and efficiently using our POS system—speedy service is key!
  • Prepare food items for customers while ensuring every order meets our high standards of quality.
  • Front of House Maintenance:
  • Keep the front area tidy and inviting. This includes cleaning tables, restocking supplies, and maintaining condiment stations.
  • Help create a welcoming atmosphere for all guests—your friendly demeanor will make their day!

The Ideal Kitchen Crew Member: Are You It?

  • Skills & Qualities:
  • Quick on your feet with a can-do attitude! You’re eager to learn and improve every day.
  • Detail-oriented with a passion for quality—because we want our food and drinks to shine!
  • Work Environment:
  • Thrive in a fast-paced kitchen where excitement is always brewing.
  • Love teamwork? Perfect! You’ll be collaborating with fellow foodies to create magic.

Qualifications

  • Previous kitchen or barista experience is awesome but not required—we’ll train you if you’re enthusiastic!
  • A basic understanding of food safety practices is a bonus.
  • Flexibility to work various shifts, including weekends and holidays—because great bagels wait for no one!

Why Join the TMBH Family?

At TMBH, we believe cooking should be fun, flavorful, and full of creativity! As part of our Crew, you’ll play a vital role in delivering scrumptious meals and delightful drinks that keep our customers coming back for more. If you’re ready to embark on this tasty adventure with us, we can’t wait to meet you!

Overseas posting opportunities may be offer for outstanding performers.


Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: $2,500.00 - $3,500.00 per month

Benefits:

  • Dental insurance
  • Employee discount
  • Food provided
  • Health insurance

Schedule:

  • Day shift
  • Early shift
  • Weekend availability
  • 5 days work week

Supplemental Pay:

  • Overtime pay
  • Performance bonus

Work Location: In person

Expected Start Date: Asap

postedCompany.name: TWO MEN BAGELS (TANJONG PAGAR) PTE. LTD.
